### VI. | EXPORT SYSTEM — iPhone-Ready Format

Each archive-ready Note will include:
- Header
- Context Tag
- Content
- Next Steps

**Examples:**
- `::GR1ND3R [PROJECT + LOGIC + OUTPUT MAP]`
- `::M4_SYLLABUS_TIER1 [MYTH AS ENGINE]`
- `::ETC4L_AUDIO_003 [SAMPLING AS PEDAGOGY]`
- `::KONS0L_ENTRY_11 [Recursion & Ritual Coding]`
- `::G4M3_ARCHIVE_01 [Interactive Myth Curriculum]`
